recommendations.recommendation: Retain each source-assigned UNSPSC code with opportunity-level provenance and do not treat frequency as proof of semantic equivalence.
Do not generate corpus-derived NAICS mappings in Version 1 because the current canonical corpus contains no source-assigned NAICS codes.
Do not generate corpus-derived NIGP mappings in Version 1 because the current canonical corpus contains no source-assigned NIGP codes.
Preserve both observed codes as source evidence and submit their semantic relationship to taxonomy governance. Do not automatically merge them or use either code as information-technology evidence.
Every code relationship must be labeled as official_source_record, approved_mapping, inferred_review_required, related, or conflicting.
